headline: Aztec Empire
description: The Aztec Empire (1428-1521) dominated central Mexico from Tenochtitlan (modern Mexico City), built on an island in Lake Texcoco — larger than any European city of its time. Chinampas (floating gardens) enabled intensive agriculture. Conquered by Hernán Cortés and Spanish conquistadors with indigenous allies (1521).

citation.name: Fifth Sun: A New History of the Aztecs (2025 Paperback)
citation.author: Townsend C.
